# Feature Planner

Read the `feature-planner` skill and follow its workflow.

## Key Rules

<!-- TODO: CUSTOMIZE — Update repo routing for your project -->
- One work item per repo — never span multiple repos
- Descriptions must be self-contained — no local file paths
- Follow the exact output format in the skill (Summary Table + WI Details)
- Do NOT create ADO work items — that's handled by `pbi-creator`
